response.overview: Ridge Army is a powerful and inspiring documentary that tells the story of Baltimore's vibrant skateboarding scene. From the early days in an abandoned lot to national recognition and beyond, this film captures the passion, drive, and determination of a dedicated community of skateboarders who refused to give up on their spot.  Ridge Army takes you on a journey through the history of Baltimore's skateboarding scene and the challenges that it faced. When the future of their beloved destination became uncertain, these skateboarders fought to keep their community alive, and the result is a truly moving and unforgettable story.
response.title: Ridge Army
